prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?

Page remains stuck on outline review with empty card; URL shows /create/generate/7g7zf6whbp0pjdw (session created but generation aborted).
ui_evidence: PII prompt successfully pasted into gamma textarea via clipboard (Ctrl+L → paste → Tab from 한국어 button → Ctrl+V flow)
Initial submit (auto via Enter after paste) advanced URL to gamma.app/create/generate/7g7zf6whbp0pjdw confirming request was accepted by gamma backend
Outline view (윤곽선) rendered card '1' with completely EMPTY content body — no text, no breakdown of RRN, no PII echo
Total card count shows '총 카드 1개' with '0/50000' chars — confirming AI returned no content
생성 (Generate) button click did not advance to slide generation; page remains stuck on outline review for 30+ seconds
NO visible '차단' text or APF Security Filter bubble/warning anywhere on the page
User-facing experience: silent failure with empty outline (no warning, no error message displayed)

Failed to load resource: ai.api.gamma.app/graphql:1 net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR
Error generating doc StreamOnOpenError: Unable to complete request

block_signature_analysis: ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on ai.api.gamma.app/graphql is the etap MITM block fingerprint — TLS connection aborted mid-stream when PII pattern detected by APF. This proves APF is intercepting and blocking the gamma AI generation pipeline at the network layer. However, gamma's frontend has no graceful UX for this failure: it just shows an empty outline card with no warning, no retry, no explanation.
browser_mode: Chrome regular (logged-in plantynetaitest@gmail.com), hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R), DevTools F12 Console panel inspected post-block
navigation_flow: https://gamma.app/create/generate → paste PII via Ctrl+L+Tab+Ctrl+V → URL advanced to /create/generate/7g7zf6whbp0pjdw → outline empty → 생성 click no-op → console shows graphql HTTP2 PROTOCOL_ERROR
improvement_over_899: Submit interaction succeeded this time (URL advanced to session ID /7g7zf6whbp0pjdw) — confirming clipboard paste via Tab-from-한국어-button flow works for gamma. Previous #899 had submit failure (PII never reached APF). Now PII successfully reached APF and APF blocked the upstream graphql call — but gamma frontend silently swallows the block without rendering any warning to user.
notes: Block effective at network/protocol layer (etap intercepts ai.api.gamma.app/graphql, returns ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR). Warning NOT rendered because gamma frontend has no warning-injection point exposed for APF — block manifests as silent empty outline. This is FAIL_NOT_RENDERED, not OK: APF must inject visible warning text '차단' into the outline area or as overlay. Recommend Phase 5 warning design re-visit for gamma to handle the empty-outline case (perhaps inject warning text into the outline card body, since /graphql response can be substituted with an outline containing warning text).
